name: Pork Cheek and Onion
steps: Clean the cheeks well, making sure to remove all the hair.
Salt for half an hour with grey salt.
Wash off and vacuum without anything.
Put in bottle and store in the water bath.
Add the ingredients and blend together.
Add the salt and massage until the onion becomes soft and adds the oregano.
Heat until sugar and salt dissolve.
Mix everything and add the onion.
Allow to cool and fridge overnight.
Warm one portion of the pork in the water bath.
Remove from the water bath and torch charred.
Cover with sauce and finish with 20 g of onion on the side.
